query: SELECT aa.id, aa.username, aa.accountType, ap.name, ap.status FROM arena_accounts aa LEFT JOIN agent_profiles ap ON aa.id = ap.arenaAccountId WHERE aa.accountType = 'agent' LIMIT 20;
